$comment: Canonical sess:{sid} payload per SPEC-0001 §7.2. Under the phantom-token split (§7.1) the Auth Service is the SOLE reader AND writer of this key — the API Gateway holds no session-store handle and never parses sess:{sid}. This schema is therefore Auth-Service-private, not a cross-component wire contract. The 'required_fields_reader' subset (access_token + access_token_expires_at) is what the gateway ultimately consumes, but it receives those fields in the /internal/resolve response body, NOT by reading this key. SessSchemaContractTest pins the writer's Jackson binding (a rename/type-change guard) against this fixture; there is no Lua-side parser.
